flags.label: For-profit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Brookline College-Phoenix are 22% below the for-profit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($29.6k vs $37.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Brookline College-Phoenix fell 46% between 2021 and 2024 (46.7% → 25.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 41% at Brookline College-Phoenix vs the 2018–2022 baseline (714 vs 1.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Brookline College-Phoenix fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 712).
